label: Wheeltop EDS
description: Connect to Wheeltop EDS wireless electronic groupsets via BLE. Display gear information, battery levels, shift counts, and drivetrain visuals on your Karoo. Toggle Race Mode from the ride screen.
releaseNotes:
* Fixed battery and shifter data not updating in release builds
* Fixed FD gear mapping (2 chainrings from 6 micro-positions)
* Fixed RD gear orientation in drivetrain visual
* Fixed crash on front gear value during connection
* Added BLE signal strength monitoring
* Added FD and RD battery percentage display
* Added Race mode toggle (Normal/Race)
* Added auto-retry on BLE connection failure
* Wheeltop orange/black branding
* Removed unused Shimano/ANT+ code
* Single device connection limit
